productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men ST FB Track Top White Jacket
description: Composition White printed track top with the shell made of 100% polyester, has long sleeves with ribbed cuffs and adidas patented Triple-Stripes, a mock collar, branding on the left chest, zippered front placket with branded zipper, two pockets on the front with zippered closures, two pockets on the front and a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash No bleaching, dry cleaning Iron with medium heat Do not iron on print Combining sport and style is adidas' forte. This sweatshirt beats the winter chill with an individualistic look. Wear this to any off-duty event to look your best. Pair this with a subtly hued tee, classic denims and sports shoes to snazz up your style. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
